articles.title: NRL Team Lists Round 19 2026: Origin chaos looms as clubs reveal squads
articles.description: Coaches face major selection calls with Origin stars racing the clock and several Round 19 lineups far from settled.

articles.title: Broncos join race for Panthers prop as four clubs opt out
articles.description: Five clubs are in, and four are out.

articles.title: Broncos legend shuffles Michael Maguire narrative, calls for players to leave
articles.description: Some have suggested Maguire has lost the dressing room during a horror run of eight straight losses.

articles.title: Major hint dropped over Billy Slater’s coaching future
articles.description: He has been linked with the Melbourne Storm job.

articles.title: Perth Bears Round 1 fixture locked in
articles.description: The Bears will be the latest club introduced into the NRL since the Dolphins in 2023.
